name: thaw
title: Thaw
description: Thaw menu bar manager for Raycast
author: diazdesandi

commands.name: toggle-hidden
commands.title: Toggle Hidden
commands.description: Show or hide the hidden menu bar section

commands.name: toggle-always-hidden
commands.title: Toggle Always Hidden
commands.description: Show or hide the always-hidden menu bar section

commands.name: search
commands.title: Search Menu Bar Items
commands.description: Open the menu bar item search panel

commands.name: toggle-thawbar
commands.title: Toggle ThawBar
commands.description: Toggle the ThawBar on the active display

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
